LanguageData.OuterRim_BARMST12Scattergun.description: The BARM-ST12 scattergun was a type of pump-action scatterblaster, the blaster equivalent of a shotgun. It lacks the ability to make use of concentrated or ionized blaster cells, but can fire a spread of micro-blasts that are almost as powerful as individual pistol bolts - at the cost of consuming a lot of energy (and tibanna) to do so.
LanguageData.OuterRim_DG29Blaster.description: The DG-29 heavy blaster pistol, also known as the DG-29 sideloader, is a model of heavy blaster pistol produced by BlasTech Industries. Whilst it cannot fire as quickly as other blaster pistols, it has better range and packs a punch comparable to a full-scale rifle in a smaller package.
LanguageData.OuterRim_VSSBlasterCarbine.description: An oddly archaic-looking blaster carbine, favoured by the Pyke Syndicate. Whilst it lacks the rapid-fire capacity of other blaster rifles and carbines, it is precise and has respectable range, and comes with a high-quality optic.
